approved_command_preview: Patch PR #312 branch fix/dcoir-review-static-context-308 for the latest dcoir-review findings. The script verifies PR head a0a512b553a3b3734007745a35357f77c499f795 and the current openrouter/duplicate-action blob SHAs before mutation, updates only .github/workflows/openrouter-pr-review.yml and .github/actions/run-duplicate-function-check/action.yml, validates the embedded Python heredocs and Markdown escaping, commits to the PR branch, pushes it, and returns the runner checkout to main for the exec status report. It does not post an external @codex request and does not mark the PR ready.
